howItWorks.subtitle: See how UB'CAL transforms hard water into healthy water for better crops

problem.title: Hard Water Damages Your Farm
problem.subtitle: Understanding the hidden costs of hard water in agriculture
problem.description: Hard water contains calcium and magnesium. When used for irrigation, these minerals create serious problems for your farm.
problem.scale: Block drip emitters and sprinklers completely
problem.salinity: Create white crust on soil surface (salinity)
problem.cropDamage: Damage crop roots and reduce nutrient uptake
problem.yieldLoss: Decrease crop yield by up to 30%
problem.impactText: Hard water costs Indian farmers thousands in lost yield every year

science.title: How Electronic Conditioning Works
science.subtitle: Simple science. Powerful results. No chemicals.
science.simpleScienceText: Hard water minerals act like magnets - they stick to each other and to pipes. UB'CAL sends electronic waves that remove that sticking power.
science.step1: Waves travel through water in pipe
science.noChemicals: No chemicals - safe for organic farming
science.allPipes: Works on all pipe types (PVC, HDPE, metal)
science.powerFact: UB'CAL uses less power than a LED bulb

solution.title: From Problem to Solution
solution.step1: Wrap coils around main water pipe

benefits.title: Why Farmers Choose UB'CAL
benefits.guarantee: 30 Day Money Back Guarantee • Easy DIY Installation • Works on All Pipe Types

animation.problemDesc: White scale blocks drippers and pipes
animation.installationDesc: Coils wrapped around main water pipe
animation.wavesDesc: Waves break mineral bonds, scale stops forming
animation.cleanDesc: Old scale disappears, water flows freely
animation.cropDesc: Healthy plants, higher yield, happy farmer

testimonials.title: What Our
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by 5000+ farmers and families across India
testimonials.agri1: Installed UB'CAL on our 5-acre sugarcane farm. Drip irrigation used to get clogged every 2 months. Now running for 6 months with zero blockages. Amazing product for farmers!
testimonials.agri2: Our grape vineyard was suffering from scale buildup in sprinklers. After UB'CAL installation, water flow is consistent and crop yield increased by 25%. Best investment for our farm.
testimonials.agri3: Vegetable farm with 2 acres of drip irrigation. Earlier had to replace drippers every season due to hard water scale. Now 8 months and all drippers working perfectly.
testimonials.agri4: Pomegranate orchard saw amazing results. Earlier water was not reaching end of rows due to scale. Now uniform water distribution everywhere. Highly recommend to all farmers.
testimonials.agri5: Polyhouse farmer here. Our misting nozzles used to clog weekly. Since UB'CAL installation, no clogs for 4 months. Plants are healthier and electricity bill reduced by 20%.
testimonials.agri6: Good product for hard water problem in our cotton farm. Maintenance cost reduced significantly. Installation team was very helpful and explained everything clearly.
testimonials.ro1: RO water tastes so pure now. My family drinks more water without any worry. The installation was quick and professional. Best decision for our home.
testimonials.ro2: Finally found a reliable RO purifier. Water quality is excellent. Customer service is very responsive. The AMC plan is affordable and worth every rupee.
testimonials.ro3: No more buying water cans. This RO purifier gives clean tasty water 24/7. My children now drink enough water without reminding them. Very happy with the purchase.
testimonials.ro4: The RO system works perfectly. TDS before was 1200, now 50. Water tastes like mineral water. Installation team was punctual and neat. 5 star service.
testimonials.ro5: Excellent product and after sales service. They called me after installation to check if everything was fine. Filter change reminder is very helpful.
testimonials.ro6: Good value for money. Water taste improved a lot. The technician came on time for installation. Would recommend to friends and family.

footer.description: Premium RO water purifiers, filtration systems, and professional AMC services for your home and business since 2020.
